data.title: The Next Global AI Trend Has a Face: Kindred Labs Partners With IPX (LINE FRIENDS, BT21) to Turn Characters Into Everyday AI
data.description: Singapore-based Kindred Labs has recently revealed a collaboration with IPX, previously recognized as LINE FRIENDS, to work on developing AI-powered companions. This strategic partnership aims to integrate well-known character brands like LINE FRIENDS, BT21, ZO&FRIENDS, and others into digital experiences. By leveraging artificial intelligence, the companions will offer engaging and emotionally responsive interactions. The project will introduce a unique form factor in the creation of these companions, providing users with a persistent cha...

data.title: Unicharm Group Discloses Global Initiatives in Conjunction with International Women's Day on March 8
data.description: In Tokyo, Unicharm Corporation (8113: TOKYO) is intensifying its efforts to reduce the global gender disparity and promote sustainable economic development through its corporate motto, "Love Your Possibilities." In line with International Women's Day on March 8, the company aims to tackle fundamental social issues like menstruation, viewing them as structural constraints. Unicharm is launching new programs to address these challenges, emphasizing a proactive approach to fostering equality.
